verification_gate: GitNexus status is up-to-date for all four repos and repo-qualified query/context calls return the recorded ownership seams.
rollback_plan: Remove only the four disposable .gitnexus indexes and this baseline proof; tracked repository source remains unchanged.
next_action: Ratify the target ownership contract in YZXCONV-002.

title: Ratify one source-to-runtime ownership contract
goal: Define exact editable-input, generated-output, runtime-state, profile, fleet, and peer boundaries before implementation.

rollback_plan: Revert the decision document and keep all current runtime selectors unchanged.
next_action: Approve exact Codex/Claude input subpaths and the single-profile selector rule.

title: Converge to one active Nix/Yazelix profile closure
goal: Make ~/.nix-profile the sole interactive foundation selector and prevent the XDG profile from selecting a different closure or adding a second owner.

target_artifacts: single-profile package contract; migration and rollback receipt
blocked_paths: /nix/store mutation outside Nix; deleting profile generations without approval; hand-editing /home/flexnetos/.local/share/yazelix/**
verification_gate: nix profile list shows one foundation element; ~/.nix-profile is the only PATH owner; any XDG selector resolves to the same closure or is inactive; yzx doctor reports one install owner.
rollback_plan: Atomically restore the pre-change profile symlink recorded in the migration receipt and keep the prior generation reachable.
next_action: Finish source package contracts, build without profile mutation, then request approval for cutover.

title: Converge Codex config authorship while preserving its real runtime home
goal: Keep the profile-owned Codex binary and ~/.codex runtime/state home while materializing config.toml from a reviewed Yazelix-owned editable input and eliminating old-profile references.

target_artifacts: Codex config input; materializer; runtime provenance gate
verification_gate: codex doctor reports the profile executable, CODEX_HOME=/home/flexnetos/.codex, parseable generated config, and no path into an inactive profile or retired workspace mirror.
rollback_plan: Restore the prior config.toml from a checksum-backed copy without moving auth, sessions, or databases.
next_action: Implement the approved config materializer after YZXCONV-003 source proof.

title: Converge Claude settings authorship through the Yazelix/envctl chain
goal: Keep the profile-owned Claude binary and ~/.claude state home while replacing direct settings authorship with reviewed Yazelix input and envctl-compatible materialization.

verification_gate: Claude launches from the one profile, settings checksum back to the approved input, generated hooks contain no stale Bash-to-Nu wrapper, and state remains under ~/.claude.
rollback_plan: Restore the previous settings.json from a checksum-backed copy without moving credentials or history.
next_action: Implement beside YZXCONV-004 so both runtimes consume one ownership contract.

title: Package the native envctl agent-env binary in the single profile
goal: Expose the native envctl binary through Yazelix toolbin/bin and remove the generated /bin/sh Meta wrapper from the active interactive route.

verification_gate: command -v envctl resolves under ~/.nix-profile; readlink reaches a native executable; no active envctl route depends on bash/sh/zsh; envctl --version and lock preview pass.
rollback_plan: Restore the prior Meta wrapper/projection and remove only the new unselected profile generation.
next_action: Build envctl from its clean worktree and consume the proven artifact in Yazelix.

title: Add preview-first Meta fleet agent-env policy and sync
goal: Give the Meta root and every declared src peer an explicit agent-env config or exclusion and drive preview/apply only through Meta and envctl frontdoors.
target_artifacts: Meta fleet policy; per-peer result report; reviewed apply receipt
blocked_paths: implicit peer config generation; project .codex/.claude hand edits; apply without approval; generated Yazelix runtime edits
verification_gate: Meta-root lock check passes; preview reports every selected peer; reviewed apply has zero broken/failed assets; a second preview is idempotent; exclusions have rationales.
rollback_plan: Use envctl's operation receipt to restore affected projections and the prior lock; never roll back unrelated peer commits together.
next_action: Implement the active Meta GitKB task as a reviewed fleet transaction.

title: Codify Meta central control and independent peer mode
goal: Make meta git and meta exec the fleet frontdoors while preserving local Git, issue, test, release, and commit authority in every peer.

verification_gate: meta git status covers the fleet; meta exec can target the four Yazelix peers; each peer local git status and repo-specific workflow remains functional and independently committable.
rollback_plan: Revert only the policy/test commit in its owning repository; peer histories remain untouched.
next_action: Land the dual-mode contract before fleet sync implementation.

title: Implement and select RTK TokenKill nu_shell mode

next_action: Design the rtk config schema in its independent repo, publish it, then pin it in Yazelix.

title: Complete the Yazelix native Nushell command catalog

title: Retire or explicitly bridge every legacy Bash POSIX and Zsh route

verification_gate: No stale bash-to-nu or user-local wrapper exists; no active Zsh/Bash command lacks a Nu equivalent; retained sh boundaries use fixed code plus structured argv and have exact behavior tests.
rollback_plan: Restore only a removed boundary whose pre-change behavior receipt proves it is required; never reintroduce an alternate profile owner.
next_action: Create the inventory from Meta canonical repos, excluding caches and runner workdirs.

rollback_plan: Restore retired tracked flake files in their independent repos and remove only the new Nu imports if verification fails.
next_action: Separate canonical peer flakes from worktree, runner, and vendored copies before editing.
